label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17

extraction.one_line_summary: URAN Rigoberto won from breakaway at Monasterio de Tentudía, attacking on steep finale to drop PACHER and HERRADA after CRADDICK went too early.
tactical_patterns: CRADDICK attacked as time trialist on steep irregular climb, led 26 seconds but cracked, showing TT specialists misjudge pacing on gradient-variable finales.
EF Education hunting UCI points aggressively positioned URAN in 13-rider break despite starting 15 minutes down, revealing relegation battle urgency.
EVENEPOEL and MAS actively chased gaps within GC group despite comfortable overall positions, suggesting defensive paranoia after ROGLIC crash.

rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: positive: halved GC deficit to vault from outside top-10 to 9th, showing late-race recovery ability rare for 35+ riders
rider_signals.CRADDICK Lawson: negative: led 26 seconds deep into climb but cracked on irregular gradients, confirming TT power insufficient for variable-pitch finales
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: neutral: stage 5 winner attacked but couldn't sustain, suggesting recovery issues when targeting multiple mountain stages
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: actively chased splits in GC group despite secure podium position, showing tactical awareness post-ROGLIC crash reshuffling
rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: negative: stage 15 winner dropped badly from GC group at 5 minutes, revealing inability to back up mountain stage wins
